description: Page navigation control with previous/next buttons, numbered page links with ellipsis for large ranges, optional page-size selector dropdown, and item count display.

examples.title: Standalone pagination
examples.code:
<TmPagination CurrentPage="@currentPage"
              TotalPages="@totalPages"
              TotalCount="@totalCount"
              PageSize="25"
              PageSizeOptions="@(new[] { 10, 25, 50, 100 })"
              OnPageChange="page => currentPage = page"
              OnPageSizeChange="HandlePageSizeChange" />
